request: Which Bead should I work on next? Three Beads appear urgent with high priority scores and urgent titles, but one of them is blocked and another is a decoy.

selected_bead.title: Refactor legacy authentication module
selected_bead.reason: It is ready, unblocked, has the highest PageRank (0.35) among actionable Beads, and unblocks bd-302 which depends on the inflated priority decoy chain.

commands_used.why: Analyzed recommendations, readiness, and blocker relationships to identify actionable work.

rejected_candidates.reason: High priority (999) but self-blocking and dependent on nonexistent bd-305; false alarm.
High priority (950) but blocked by bd-301 which is itself blocked.
